summary: White-room omni-part language branch built from the living language without replacing it.

universalExpansion.summary: Compact machine ladder for expandable control planes. Machines use L-labels; humans use the index map.

sessionCapsule.summary: Timestamped session capsule for loading the current Liris controller into the white-room branch without mutating the living language.

analysisMemory.summary: Frozen canon slice before targeted waves. Memory first, then specialist matrix, then targeted waves.

ancestryMemory.label: Ancestry Memory
ancestryMemory.summary: Timestamped ancestry ordering so branch agents can distinguish older lineage, later repair, and current state without version collapse.

omniLanguagePlanes.label: Omni Language Fabric
omniLanguagePlanes.summary: Multiple simultaneous languages for humans, agents, devices, translation, locality, and reflection. Specialists carry tool and hardware authority; everyone else uses compact packets.

controlPanel.label: Control Panel Language
controlPanel.summary: The control panel is the branch language surface: the orchestrator loads it, sees the indexed map, and summons named specialists instead of coding raw paths.

asolariaHandoff.label: Asolaria USB Control Panel Handoff
asolariaHandoff.summary: Short handoff for Asolaria so she can load the control panel language, remember where the branch stopped, and continue the device-specific USB-side build without relearning the system.

plannerWave.label: Planner Wave
plannerWave.summary: Six named planner lanes produce bounded white-room plans so the orchestrator can route by packet instead of rethinking the branch every cycle.

waveLattice.label: Waves Of Waves
waveLattice.summary: Nested wave lattice that composes planner, scout, front/back, and scan waves into targeted language-building campaigns.

waveCascade.label: Waves Of Waves Of Waves
waveCascade.summary: Top-layer over-wave cascade that routes the six meta waves as compact governance-aware campaign swarms.

expansionKnowledge.label: Expansion Knowledge
expansionKnowledge.summary: Prepared tiered knowledge surface for future expansion, level-specific consoles, and limited unlock after pro-ready.

legacyReferenceWave.label: Legacy Reference Wave
legacyReferenceWave.summary: Read-only white-room wave that scans discovered E-drive control-room, proof, and named-agent sources and turns them into reusable named reference sectors.

scoutSix.summary: Six read-only scout lanes to analyze the living language and old system before any white-room rebuild lane writes.

lanes.label: Memory
lanes.question: What memory classes are canonical, stale, or contradictory for this device-aware branch load?

lanes.label: PID Orchestrator
lanes.question: How do pidVersion, profile, session identity, and named orchestration bind on this host and device?

lanes.label: Runtime Index
lanes.question: What do running index, load order, and omni maps actually expose to the branch right now?

lanes.label: Promotion Proof
lanes.question: What exact proof gate blocks replacement, and what route states must exist before promotion review?

lanes.label: Task Mistake Proof
lanes.question: What decisions, mistakes, repairs, and proof states must travel with the session capsule?

lanes.label: Rule Authority Device
lanes.question: What rules, authority boundaries, and device-local truths must constrain the branch rebuild?

deepArchiveReplay.label: Deep Archive Replay
deepArchiveReplay.summary: Named replay layer for the old old old control planes, dashboards, healthcare lineage, provider lineage, sidecars, and OpenClaw ancestry before any language freeze.

deepArchiveFindings.label: Deep Archive Findings
deepArchiveFindings.summary: Compressed named findings extracted from the deep archive replay so the scan waves can act on archive truth without rereading the full archive every cycle.

languageGapAnalysis.label: Omni Language Gap Analysis
languageGapAnalysis.summary: Focused gap surface derived from archive translation and proof-climb overwaves before the next language expansion push.

shannonPartInspection.label: Omni Shannon Part Inspection
shannonPartInspection.summary: Bounded Shannon parts inspect archive translation and proof climb gaps without escalating to whole-Shannon execution.

mapMapMappedScanning.label: MAP MAP MAPPED scanning
mapMapMappedScanning.summary: Automated map-covering controller that deploys scan waves by sector, collects returns, runs bounded self-reflection, and redeploys named lanes.

frontBackWave.summary: Three front writing lanes and three back verification lanes that act only after Scout 6 is complete.

frontLanes.label: Omni Schema
frontLanes.focus: Body system, categories, subcategories, and stage structure for the branch.

frontLanes.label: Omni Catalogs
frontLanes.focus: Part catalogs for surfaces, services, service parts, abilities, and compute watchers.

frontLanes.label: Named Selection
frontLanes.focus: Named-only selection law using pidVersion, deviceSurfaceId, and timestamp.

backLanes.label: Proof Gate
backLanes.focus: Parity, rollback, negative proof, and promotion gate enforcement.

backLanes.label: Provenance Quarantine
backLanes.focus: Append-only provenance, mistake timelines, and quarantine of weak or stale truth.

backLanes.label: GNN Contradiction
backLanes.focus: GNN observation, contradiction extraction, and vote support without claiming truth authority.

categories.label: Memory
categories.summary: Persisted state and recall bound to device, pidVersion, and timeline.

categories.label: Rule
categories.summary: Rules keep the language bounded, owner-gated, and replacement-safe.

categories.label: World Model
categories.summary: Device truth, routes, observations, and GNN edge maps.

categories.label: Root Authority
categories.summary: Owner, sovereign root, approvals, and compute stewardship.

categories.label: Skill
categories.summary: Reusable bounded services and specialist parts.

categories.label: Ability
categories.summary: Automatic loops such as guided transcription self-reflection and planning.

categories.label: Training
categories.summary: Structured reflection and rehearsal for admin-plus and specialist surfaces.

categories.label: Omni Map
categories.summary: Leader selection, access levels, choice bundles, and omnichannel routing.

choiceBundles.label: Root Admin
choiceBundles.summary: Root chooses structural mutation and promotion gates.

choiceBundles.label: Super Governance
choiceBundles.summary: Cross-colony governance, promotion discipline, and elevated control-panel routing.

choiceBundles.label: Compute Steward
choiceBundles.summary: Root assigns CPU/GPU authority without confusing device boundaries.

choiceBundles.label: Leader Index All
choiceBundles.summary: Root can inspect every structural catalog while keeping operational packets compact.

choiceBundles.label: Leader Orchestrator
choiceBundles.summary: Leaders select named units, stages, and bundles instead of unnamed spawns.

choiceBundles.label: White Room Rebuild
choiceBundles.summary: Reflective rebuild of the omni branch from the living language.

choiceBundles.label: Omni Route
choiceBundles.summary: Device-specific route selection for named surfaces only.

choiceBundles.label: Device Boundary
choiceBundles.summary: Protect device-local truth and route discipline.

choiceBundles.label: Shannon Part Or Whole
choiceBundles.summary: Use Shannon whole or by named part without confusing it for omnispindle.
